info.title: Aura Bank Customer Database Action Group
info.description: Provides the Resolution Agent with read-only access to Aura Bank customer profiles, account balances, and recent transactions. Use these tools to investigate and verify a customer's claim before taking any action.

post.summary: Look up a customer profile by their identity details
post.description: Looks up a customer profile using their full name, account number, and sort code. Returns the unique customer_id required for all subsequent tool calls. Returns an identity mismatch error if the details do not match — do NOT proceed with sensitive actions if this happens.

full_name.description: The customer's full name exactly as provided in the complaint (e.g. 'Jane Smith').

account_number.description: The customer's 8-digit bank account number (digits only, no spaces or dashes).

200.description: Customer profile found and identity verified.

id.description: The unique customer_id (UUID). Pass this to get_account_balances.

error.description: Present only if the identity check failed or account was not found.

post.summary: Fetch all account balances for a verified customer
post.description: Fetches all bank accounts (Current, Savings, Credit Cards, Mortgages) and their current balances for a given Aura Bank customer ID. Always call get_customer_profile first to obtain the customer_id. The account id (UUID) returned here is required for get_recent_transactions and financial actions.

customer_id.description: The UUID customer_id returned from get_customer_profile.

200.description: List of all accounts and their balances.

id.description: The unique account_id (UUID). Pass this to get_recent_transactions or financial action tools.

post.summary: Fetch recent transactions for a specific account
post.description: Fetches the most recent transactions for a specific Aura Bank account ID. Use this to verify whether a customer was charged a specific amount by a specific merchant. Requires the account_id (UUID) from get_account_balances.

limit.description: Maximum number of recent transactions to return. Defaults to 10.
